title: vNext Workflow Definition
description: Schema for vNext Workflow Component Definition JSON files (sys-flows flow)

sharedTransitions.description: Shared transitions available across multiple states

errorBoundary.description: Global error boundary for the workflow. Applied when no task or state-level boundary handles the error.

cancel.description: Cancel transition definition. Only manual trigger (triggerType: 0) is allowed.

exit.description: Exit transition definition. Only manual trigger (triggerType: 0) is allowed.

updateData.description: Update  data transition definition. Only manual trigger (triggerType: 0) is allowed.

states.description: States in the workflow. Only one initial state (stateType: 1) is allowed.

schema.description: Master schema definition for the workflow to validate the data

queryRoles.description: Root-level query roles for instance access. Used when state has no queryRoles. DENY overrides ALLOW.

role.description: Role name (current: Amorphie roles; future: domain.rolename)

triggerType.description: Type of trigger for the transition

triggerKind.description: Kind of trigger for automatic transitions

language.description: Language code (ISO 639-1 with optional region code: en, en-US, tr, tr-TR)

reference.description: Generic reference - can be either explicit reference or ref

code.description: Script code content (string), or a sys-mappings reference when encoding is REF.

scripts.description: Helper script references and allowed assemblies for mapping execution.

allowedAssemblies.description: Allowed .NET assemblies for the script execution context.

viewOverrides.description: Dictionary of view overrides for subflow views. Key is the original view key, value is the reference to the new view definition.

overrides.description: Unified override configuration (views, transition roles, state query roles, timeout). Use instead of or alongside legacy viewOverrides.

subFlow.description: Information about the sub-workflow to be called for SubFlow state type. Can be null if developer does not have a subflow definition.

errorBoundary.description: Task-level error boundary. Provides the most specific error handling for this task.

target.description: Target state key. Can be a state key or special keyword like $self

from.description: Source state key (optional for shared transitions)

timer.description: Timer information if the transition should execute automatically

roles.description: Transition roles for authorization. DENY overrides ALLOW; default DENY when no match.

target.description: Target state key. Can be a state key or special keyword like $self

from.description: Source state key (optional for shared transitions)

triggerType.description: Trigger type for shared transitions: Manual (0), Scheduled (2), Event (3)

availableIn.description: States where this shared transition is available

roles.description: Transition roles for authorization. DENY overrides ALLOW; default DENY when no match.

timer.description: Timer information if the transition should execute automatically

availableIn.description: States where this shared transition is available

target.description: Target state key (must be an Initial state)

triggerType.description: Start transition must be manual trigger only

roles.description: Transition roles for authorization. DENY overrides ALLOW; default DENY when no match.

target.description: Target state key when cancel is executed

triggerType.description: Cancel transition must be manual trigger only

schema.description: Data schema reference that must be sent to execute the cancel transition

onExecutionTasks.description: Tasks to execute during cancel transition

mapping.description: Optional mapping definition for cancel transition input data transformation

roles.description: Transition roles for authorization. DENY overrides ALLOW; default DENY when no match.

annotations.description: Key-value annotations for the cancel transition

target.description: Target state key when exit is executed

triggerType.description: Exit transition must be manual trigger only

schema.description: Data schema reference that must be sent to execute the exit transition

onExecutionTasks.description: Tasks to execute during exit transition

mapping.description: Optional mapping definition for exit transition input data transformation

roles.description: Transition roles for authorization. DENY overrides ALLOW; default DENY when no match.

annotations.description: Key-value annotations for the exit transition

_comment.description: Comment about the update data transition

target.description: Target state key when update data is executed (must be $self)

triggerType.description: update data transition must be manual trigger only

schema.description: Data schema reference that must be sent to execute the update data transition

onExecutionTasks.description: Tasks to execute during update data transition

mapping.description: Optional mapping definition for update data transition input data transformation

roles.description: Transition roles for authorization. DENY overrides ALLOW; default DENY when no match.

annotations.description: Key-value annotations for the update data transition

onEntries.description: Tasks to execute when entering the state

onExits.description: Tasks to execute when exiting the state

errorBoundary.description: State-level error boundary. Applied when no task-level boundary handles the error.

queryRoles.description: State-level query roles for instance access. Overrides root queryRoles when present. DENY overrides ALLOW.

alias.description: Optional role-scoped aliases for the state. Each alias provides alternative multi-language labels for a state, shown to users matching the alias roles.

interaction.description: Optional state interaction configuration (e.g. long polling).

notifications.description: Notification definitions attached to this state.

stateAlias.description: Role-scoped alias for a state, providing alternative multi-language labels for users matching the given roles.

roles.description: Roles for which this alias applies. DENY overrides ALLOW.

enumDescriptions: Abort (0) - Abort execution. Transition must not be set.
Retry (1) - Retry with configured retry policy. RetryPolicy is required.
Rollback (2) - Rollback to compensation state. Transition is required (transition key).
Notify (4) - Send notification and transition. Transition is required (transition key).
Log (5) - Log only, does not affect flow
errorAction.description: Action to take when an error is caught by an error boundary. Constraint: Abort → no transition; Retry → retryPolicy required; Rollback/Notify → transition required.

retryPolicy.description: Configures retry behavior for error handling. Required when error action is Retry. InitialDelay must be a positive duration; MaxDelay must be greater than or equal to InitialDelay. For BackoffType Exponential, backoffMultiplier must be greater than 0.

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts (0 or greater; values above 100 are discouraged)

initialDelay.description: Initial delay before first retry (ISO 8601 duration). Must be greater than zero.

maxDelay.description: Maximum delay between retries (ISO 8601 duration). Must be greater than or equal to initialDelay.

useJitter.description: Whether to add random jitter to retry delays

errorHandlerRule.description: A single error handling rule within an error boundary

then.description: When action is Abort (0), transition must not be set (backend will reject non-empty transition).

errorTypes.description: Exception type names to match (e.g., ValidationException). Omit or use '*' to match all. Items must not be empty or whitespace.

errorCodes.description: Error codes to match (e.g., 'Task:400007', '500'). Omit or use '*' to match all. Items must not be empty or whitespace.

transition.description: Workflow transition key to trigger when this rule matches. Required when action is Notify or Rollback. Must not be set when action is Abort. Must reference a valid transition key (StartTransition, Cancel, SharedTransitions, or state transition key).

priority.description: Rule priority. Lower values evaluated first. Must be greater than 0. Default 100; use higher values (e.g. 999) for wildcard/fallback rules. Duplicate priorities are allowed but unique values are recommended for deterministic matching.

logOnly.description: If true, only logs the error without affecting execution flow

timeoutPolicy.description: Timeout-specific error handling policy. When action is Retry, defaultRetryPolicy is required. Transition must not be set when action is Abort. Transition must reference a valid workflow state key.

then.description: When action is Abort (0), transition must not be set (backend will reject non-empty transition).

transition.description: State key to transition to on timeout. Must match a workflow state key. Must not be set when action is Abort.

errorBoundary.description: Container for error handling policies. Used at workflow level (global), state level, and on task execution (OnExecuteTask, OnEntry, OnExit). OnError rules are evaluated by effective priority (lower first); duplicate priorities are discouraged. OnTimeout applies when the operation times out.

onError.description: Error handling rules evaluated in priority order (lower value first). Rule transition references workflow transition keys. Empty array is valid (no error rules).

mapping.description: Optional mapping script for dynamic timeout duration calculation. When provided, the script is executed at runtime to determine the timeout schedule. If the mapping fails, the static timer duration is used as fallback.

subFlowTransitionOverride.description: Per-transition override configuration for a subflow. Replaces transition roles.

roles.description: Transition role overrides. DENY always overrides ALLOW.

subFlowStateOverride.description: Per-state override configuration for a subflow. Replaces state query roles.

queryRoles.description: State query role overrides. DENY always overrides ALLOW.

subFlowOverrides.description: Unified override configuration for a subflow. All overrides use replace mode.

views.description: Dictionary of view overrides. Key is the original view key, value is the new view reference.

transitions.description: Dictionary of transition overrides. Key is the transition key.

states.description: Dictionary of state overrides. Key is the state key.

longPoll.description: Long polling configuration for the state. The runtime keeps the request open until a transition occurs or the fallback timeout elapses.

terminate.description: Whether the long poll terminates the open request when the state is left.

fallbackTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum number of seconds to hold the request open before falling back.

roles.description: Roles allowed to use the long poll interaction. DENY overrides ALLOW.

stateNotification.description: Notification configuration attached to a state.

type.description: Notification type. Currently only State (0) is supported.
